标题: Replica-level Balenciaga Paris 3XL Chain Lock Dad Sneakers. Continuing the trendy distressed dad sneaker style, the upper is made of polyester fiber, nylon, TPU, and polyurethane, enhancing both appearance and lightweight comfort. Features a woven pull tab on the heel, Balenciaga branding on the outsole and heel, "unity sports icon" artwork on the upper, and "3B sports icon" artwork on the tongue. Fabric lining and cushioned insole ensure comfort. Sizes: 35-45 (custom orders: women’s 40, men’s 45).
